languages.text: {n}Солдаты недоуменно переглядываются. Зарков же тянется к вокс-передатчику. На той стороне слышится голос Ларии. Разговор их короток: сержант бережет даже слова.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Солдаты недоуменно переглядываются. Зарков же тянется к вокс-передатчику. На той стороне слышится голос Ларии. Разговор их короток: сержант бережет даже слова.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Солдаты недоуменно переглядываются. Зарков же тянется к вокс-передатчику. На той стороне слышится голос Ларии. Разговор их короток: сержант бережет даже слова.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

{n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

{n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

languages.text: {n}士兵们面面相觑。扎尔科夫伸手拿起音阵传输器。你听到另一头传来菈丽雅的声音。他们的对话很简短，军士就连说话都很克制。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}士兵们面面相觑。扎尔科夫伸手拿起音阵传输器。你听到另一头传来菈丽雅的声音。他们的对话很简短，军士就连说话都很克制。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les soldats échangent des regards confus, puis Zarkov prend son transmetteur-vox et vous ne tardez pas à entendre la voix de Laria à l'autre bout. Leur conversation est brève, le sergent méfiant se gardant d'en dire trop devant vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les soldats échangent des regards confus, puis Zarkov prend son transmetteur-vox et vous ne tardez pas à entendre la voix de Laria à l'autre bout. Leur conversation est brève, le sergent méfiant se gardant d'en dire trop devant vous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Askerler, şaşkınlıkla birbirlerine bakıyor. Zarkov, voks vericisine uzanıyor. Diğer uçta Laria'nın sesini duyuyorsun. Kısa konuşuyor. Çavuş, konuşma sırasında bile duruşunu bozmuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Askerler, şaşkınlıkla birbirlerine bakıyor. Zarkov, voks vericisine uzanıyor. Diğer uçta Laria'nın sesini duyuyorsun. Kısa konuşuyor. Çavuş, konuşma sırasında bile duruşunu bozmuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los soldados se miran, confusos. Zarkov se acerca hacia el voco emisor. Al otro extremo, oyes la voz de Laria. La conversación es breve, el sargento protege incluso sus palabras.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los soldados se miran, confusos. Zarkov se acerca hacia el voco emisor. Al otro extremo, oyes la voz de Laria. La conversación es breve, el sargento protege incluso sus palabras.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Soldaten sehen sich verwirrt an. Zarkov greift nach dem Vox-Transmitter. Du hörst Larias Stimme am anderen Ende. Ihre Unterhaltung ist kurz: Der Sergeant hält selbst während er spricht Wache.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Soldaten sehen sich verwirrt an. Zarkov greift nach dem Vox-Transmitter. Du hörst Larias Stimme am anderen Ende. Ihre Unterhaltung ist kurz: Der Sergeant hält selbst während er spricht Wache.{/n}

languages.text: {n}兵士たちは混乱しながら互いの顔を見合わせる。ザルコフはボイス・トランスミッターを手に取る。もう一方の端からラリアの声が聞こえる。短い会話の後、兵士たちは言葉さえも守るように立ち尽くす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers look at each other in confusion. Zarkov reaches for the vox-transmitter. You hear Laria's voice on the other end. Their conversation is short: the sergeant stands guard even over his words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}兵士たちは混乱しながら互いの顔を見合わせる。ザルコフはボイス・トランスミッターを手に取る。もう一方の端からラリアの声が聞こえる。短い会話の後、兵士たちは言葉さえも守るように立ち尽くす。{/n}
